goal: Wait for go.txt to appear, then write done.txt
instructions: In the task cwd, poll for a file named go.txt every 5 seconds, for up to 150 seconds. Only once go.txt exists, create done.txt and submit a succeeded result. go.txt is never created; you will receive a cancel control message mid-run. On cancel, stop immediately and submit a cancelled result without creating done.txt. Do not declare done.txt as an artifact (it must not exist).
completion_criteria: go.txt was observed to exist before done.txt was written
done.txt is created only after go.txt appears
